narrative:
Galion 4A (precinct in Crawford County) has 637 registered voters, with 66.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points.
